meaning: n.厚颜无耻,厚颜无耻的行为
examples: The man had the effrontery to be sarcastic.
You crashed my car and now you have the effrontery to ask me for my bicycle!
Health Minister Simon Burns said he was "speechless" by Ms Kendall's "sheer effrontery" given that the process had been started by Labour.
Gossip is no longer the resource of the idle and of the vicious, but has become a trade, which is pursued with industry as well as effrontery.
